purpose: Simplified Form alternative — automatically lays out Label + Input pairs in responsive columns. Less verbose than Form, more rigid.
whenToUse: Object edit screens with mostly text/select fields
whenNotToUse: Multi-line data entry — use multiple Forms
doRules: Use FormElement for each field row
Set responsive layout (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop)
dontRules: Do not mix SimpleForm with Form in the same screen
Do not use SimpleForm for complex layouts

layoutGuidance.placement: Place SimpleForm inside a compatible container (DynamicPage, Panel, Dialog).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for forms.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
